variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SABP 020004 Glass For Cyclone. Easy to install and replace, the SABP 020004 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: GLASS FOR CYCLONE, Dimension 1 (D1): 287.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 281.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 275.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 161.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 110.0 mm
